name: Fleetwood Community Bus Inc
recent_news: Registered as 501(c)(3) charitable organization in Fleetwood, PA (EIN 23-2666338); not a school-bus contractor for hire. Charity Navigator profile lacks financials.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Appears to be a nonprofit community/senior shuttle, not a school-bus contractor. Fleetwood Area SD transportation handled separately.

name: Gotham Transportation
recent_news: Listed on NYC DOE 2013 vendor roster as Gotham Transportation Corp., 2847 W 21st St, Brooklyn, owned by Joseph Sabatelli. Joseph Sabatelli is now deceased per obituary; Joanne Sabatelli identified as President/widow. Related entity 'The Gotham Bus Company' (gothambus.com) reportedly no longer taking new customers.
fit_notes: Small Brooklyn NYC DOE pupil-transport contractor. Founder deceased and widow leading — classic succession setup. Tiny (~37 employees) but potential bolt-on to a NYC-metro school-bus platform if licenses/routes still active.

name: Academy Express LLC
owner_or_parent: likely defunct (former Atlantic Express address) OR Academy Bus LLC (charter/commuter, not school)
recent_news: Address 7 North St, Staten Island matches the historical Atlantic Express Coachways depot; Atlantic Express closed in 2013 after Chapter 11. The name 'Academy Express LLC' is also the legal name of a subsidiary of Academy Bus LLC (NJ-based commuter/charter operator), which is not a school-bus contractor. Listing appears to be either defunct or a misclassified non-school operator.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Either defunct (Atlantic Express legacy address) or part of Academy Bus charter/commuter holding company — neither is an independent school-bus tuck-in target.

name: Atlantic Express Si Bus Co
districts_or_customers: formerly NYC DOE and 100+ districts in 5 states
recent_news: Atlantic Express was the 5th-largest school-bus operator in US/Canada; filed Ch.11 in late 2013 after labor battle, lost ~100 buses to Superstorm Sandy, and shut down by year-end 2013. 260 Meredith Ave was a historical depot. Entity is defunct.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Defunct since 2013 Chapter 11 wind-down. Any remaining listing is stale registration; no operating company to acquire.

name: Gross School Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Founder William P. Gross sold Gross School Bus Service and related Gross Equipment Co. to Landmark Student Transportation (Canadian strategic / now part of Student Transportation Inc. lineage) in 2016 at age 90. Now operates as G&L Student Transportation, a wholly-owned Landmark subsidiary, at same 980 Hoffmansville Rd address.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Already acquired by Landmark Student Transportation in 2016; now operates as G&L Student Transportation. Strategic-owned, not an independent target.
